title: Cave Dweller Evolved (Fabric)
description:
Forked Fabric version of SiverDX's version of Cave Dweller Evolved for FML with added Cloth Config API support for use in ModMenu. Works in Multiplayer as well.

Forked and updated by Khajiitos on Fiverr.
body:
A forked Fabric version of SiverDX's Cave Dweller Evolved Mod for FML with added Cloth Config API support for use in ModMenu. Not necessarily needed to configure but recommended for ease of access. 

If you're not using the Cloth Config API for whatever reason you can still configure the Cave Dweller through cave_dweller.properties under AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\config directory. 

Yes this mod also works in Multiplayer.

### Note
**I'm not the developer or original author of this mod, I asked for permission from SiverDX and Khajiitos to upload the Fabric fork here under MIT License. I will not be providing further support or help with issues relating to the code itself, crashes or bugs.**

### Discord
Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/mKNnStqduS) if you wanna discuss or help on installing on the Cave Dweller Mod, just note, **this is not a support server for issues or bugs, please do not report your issues there.**

# Credits
Forked and updated by Khajiitos on Fiverr. Check him out on [Fiverr](https://www.fiverr.com/freelancers/khajiitos?source=order_page_user_message_inner_link)

Forge Mod by SiverDX: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-evolved

Original Mod by Gargin: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller

## Dependencies
+ [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) (Required)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (Optional)
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Optional)
